commit_message:
add end to end asm tests for EEL core, assembly script (alternative to rars) add end to end asm tests for EEL core, assembly script (alternative to rars) - **added comments to force rule, ran formatter on top.sv**
- **introduced BP files from @rogelio**
- **fix makefile comment, fix BP #define**
- **massive pile of changes, suspected issue with DMEM writes (can dump values when initialized, cannot observe any changes caused by ASM stores)**
- **DMEM issue resolved. problem was that i didn't noti

add end to end asm tests for EEL core, assembly script (alternative to rars) add end to end asm tests for EEL core, assembly script (alternative to rars) - **added comments to force rule, ran formatter on top.sv**

- **DMEM issue resolved. problem was that i didn't noti
examples.patch:
@@ -1,29 +1,27 @@
-`timescale 1ns/1ps
+`timescale 1ns / 1ps
 
 // module: IMEM 64kb
 // author: Ryan Cramer
 
-module IMEM #(parameter ADDR_DEPTH = 14)
-(
+module IMEM #(
+    parameter ADDR_DEPTH = 14
+) (
     input RDEN,
     input [ADDR_DEPTH-1:0] ADDR,
     output logic [31:0] MEM_OUT
 );
 
-(* rom_style = "{distributed | block}" *)
-(* rom_decomp = "power" *) logic [31:0] rom_64kb [0:2**ADDR_DEPTH-1];
+  (* rom_style = "{distributed | block}" *)
+  (* rom_decomp = "power" *) logic [31:0] rom_64kb[0:2**ADDR_DEPTH-1];
 
-initial begin
-    $readmemh("eel_program.mem", rom_64kb);
-end
 
-always_comb begin
-    if(RDEN) begin
-        MEM_OUT = rom_64kb[ADDR];
+  always_comb begin
+    if (RDEN) begin
+      MEM_OUT = rom_64kb[ADDR];
+    end else begin
+      MEM_OUT = 'b0;
     end
-    else begin
-        MEM_OUT = 'b0;
-    end
-end
+  end
+
+endmodule
 
-endmodule
\ No newline at end of file
